{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213959E65D9AA3B12E1CB468A9"}"},"total":1107},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7454986671491810110","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，主角深谙苟道，弱时幕后谋划，强时重拳出击，世界观应该也很庞大，还有很多搞笑剧情。但是一天一章根本不够看啊，作者快点更新吧","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":21,"text":"重拳出击","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741003991CB468A9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227454986671491810110%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227285689957086137399%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735753606,"group_id":"7285689957086137399","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"山海无祂，我即是祂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0p39grOnPq5LPhgPZslh4U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d6b035b407be47f4932b241733640328~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619328&x-signature=EkO0rbyKAi6DvnqoJsfwpO%2BJpaI%3D","user_id":"175516355146744","user_name":"聚荒福"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"175516355146744","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7285689957086137399","book_info":{"abstract":"【沙雕反派×逆子兄弟】
【挖坑，较真，专治各种不服，虐渣，玩梗，命里缺德，老六疯批！】
江辰被大货车创飞穿书悲惨富二代小反派，追了三年的女神，却连小手都没拉过，最终砸钱把自己玩死，最终成为龙王狱友，痔疮破裂活活疼死。
面对这个无药可救的世界，江辰的内心很是复杂，“完了，我成爽文主角的虐的渣渣了！”
不过，秉持着穷人靠变异，富人靠科技，穿越者是挂壁的定律，江·反骨·辰忽然觉得自己又行了！

刚穿越来，白莲花女神逼逼赖赖怎么办？
江辰清了清嗓音，勇敢捡起自尊：“你家住敦煌的吧，壁画这么多？”

女同学诽谤我是渣男怎么办？
江辰主打的就是一个较真：“警察蜀黍，她们诽谤，诽谤我啊！”

面对复杂家庭关系，江辰也轻松应对！
暴力老妹的生日这种小事怎能马虎，
“十套五年模拟，三年高考！”

面对失恋深受轻伤的江辰，宿舍的逆子是这么做的；
"辰哥别难过了，兄弟们，把老六绑起来扔辰哥床上！"

主角太强势怎么办，没关系！
主打的就是一个不服！
“不用怕，我兄弟多，让他们先上，关门，放老六！”
